1.description: get column names for fylke table in fylker schema

2.description: get municipalities in Finnmark with kommunenummer and name

3.description: get 200-year flood zones geometry and id, prefiltered to Finnmark if possible

4.description: get buildings with kommunenummer and geometry for Finnmark municipalities

5.description: intersect buildings with 200-year flood zones to tag affected buildings

6.description: count affected buildings per kommunenummer and sort top 5

7.description: join counts to municipality names for final output

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE lower(fylkesnavn) ILIKE '%finnmark%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer IN ('5601','5602','5603','5604','5605','5606','5607','5608','5609','5610','5611','5612','5613','5614','5615','5616','5617','5618','5619','5620','5621','5622');

FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;
